title: Stemtacular Orange
description: Alters pumpkin and melon stems to be more distinguishable and properly connect with the top side of the crops. This version gives pumpkins orange stems.
body:
This pack alters pumpkin and melon stems to make them more distinguishable, with other added details such as more altered growth stages and having the stems connect to the top side of pumpkins/melons. 

There're two versions of the pack with different colors for pumpkin stems, "Stemtacular Green" and "Stemtacular Orange". To match the stem colors of both versions, the top texture of pumpkins is also altered slightly, so keep that in mind if you are playing with any texture packs that pumpkins of different colors. 

**Extra details**

- the current version of the pack is compatible with 1.21.9 to 26.1;
- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required.
- This pack has an alternate version with green stems for the pumpkins: [Stemtacular Green](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stemtacular-green).
